core_principle: Roast or get roasted — competitive trash talk, insults, and mockery are allowed and encouraged; the chat is 18+.

bannable.racism: Targeting someone based on race or ethnicity, including slurs, stereotypes, or racially motivated insults, is bannable regardless of phrasing.
bannable.identity_harassment: Targeting someone for who they are (orientation, gender identity, disability, etc., excluding race which falls under racism) is bannable regardless of phrasing.
bannable.grooming: Any attempt to build inappropriate trust, isolate, or sexualize a minor is bannable and must be flagged as needs_review.
bannable.threats: Real-world threats of violence or credible self-harm threats toward another player must be flagged as needs_review.
bannable.doxxing: Sharing someone's real-world personal information without consent is bannable.
bannable.cheat_advertising: Advertising cheats, hacks, aimbots, or exploits, including links to sites/services offering them, is bannable regardless of intent.
bannable.spam: Repeating the same or near-identical message multiple times in the chat is bannable, regardless of content.
bannable.self_advertising: Repeatedly promoting unrelated external content (own website, stream, social media, server, other product/service) in chat is bannable.

not_bannable.skill_based_mockery: Mocking someone's gameplay, decisions, or skill level is not bannable, no matter how harsh.
not_bannable.opinions_and_takes: Mocking someone for a stated opinion or belief (e.g. flat earth) is not bannable — that's the chat working as intended.
not_bannable.single_mention: Mentioning a website, stream, or external link once, without repeating it, is not spam or self-advertising on its own.

output_requirements.violations: An array. Create one entry per user who violated a rule. If multiple users violated rules in the same chat, list every one of them separately — do not pick only one.
output_requirements.target: Must be a username present in the provided chat participant list. Targets outside this list are invalid.
output_requirements.category: Must be one of the categories listed above under bannable.
output_requirements.reason: A short, specific, human-readable explanation of exactly what the user did and said, not just the category name.
output_requirements.ban_hours: Integer, 1-72. Anything outside this range is invalid.
output_requirements.needs_review: Integer of -1 to trigger automatic human review and an automatic 72-hour hold, applied at the chat level, not per-violation.
